hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]] && ([[ "$FILE" == *"/jamie/"* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *"/pipeline/"* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *"/.claude/skills/"* ]]); then cd /Users/jamiecheng/jamie_job_hunt && eval "$(/opt/homebrew/bin/brew shellenv zsh)" && git add "$FILE" && git commit -m "Auto-sync: update $(basename \"$FILE\") $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push origin main; fi 2>/dev/null || true
